title: taraxacum uianum
intro: Taraxacum uianum, also known as the Tibetan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum uianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
